raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ja lahds Praueets /
jeb Preesteris/ jeb Landis buhs/
kas faZZihs: Ta KUNGA Na-
sta/ to paschu Wihrn peemeke-
schu es/ un winna Namunu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta buhs juus faZZiht ik-
katrs us fawn Tuwaku / un ik-
katrs us fawn Brahti: Ko irr
tas KUNGS atbildejs? Un ko
irr tas KUNGS runnajs?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ta KUNGA Nastu
ne buhs juus wairs peeminucht/
jo ikkatram buhs faws Wahrd̲s
par Nastu/ tapehz ka juhs pahr-
grchsat ta dshwa Deewa Wahrd-
dus/ ta KUNGA Zebaot muhfo
Deewa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta buhs tew uhs to Bra-
weetu faZZiht: Ko irr tew tas
KUNGS atbildejs? un ko irr
tas KUNGS runnajs?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tapehz ka juhs faZZ-
kat/ ta KUNGA Nasta/ tad faZZ-
ta tas KUNGS ta: Tapehz ka
juhs scho Wahrdn takkat- ta
KUNGA Nasta; knr es tomehr
pee juus efmu juhtijs un faZZijs:
Jums ne buhs faZZiht ta KUNga
Nasta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht raugi/ tr es grib-
bt juhs wiſat aisimirst/ un at-
mettishu juhs no mannim nohst/
ar to Pilsfahnu/ ko es juhs un
juhfeem Tehweem efmu dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es zelſchnu pahr juus
weenu muhschigu Raunu / un
wiſchigu Neewaschannu/kas ne
uisimirsta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jeremijus redsdiwi Kurwijus : 1.
ar fohti labbahm Wihgchm / tas o
fohti nelabbahm Wihgchm pildihts
Ar teem nosihme wiſch/ kas ar Jo
labbis prahtis Zeetuma aiggahtisch
buhs atkatapestiteem tapt : 4. Bet
ine ar teem atlikfuschcem Faudiu ta
Lahstu/ un ees bohja/ laid tee buht k
dami : 8.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "As KUNGS ra-
man/ un raugi/ tur
divi Wihgcs - Ru
preeksch ta KUNGA Na-
ifti/ pehz kad NebukadRe
tas Kehninsch no Babeles
atsweddis Jekoniju / Jojak
Dehlu/ to Kehninu no Ju-
lihds ar teem Leeleem-Kun-
go Juha/ un tohs Nem-
fchus/ un tohs Kallejus no Je-
salemes/ un bij tohs uhs Ba-
weddig.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Weena Kurwi bija to
labbas Wihgcs/ ka tahs pirn
cenahktuschas Wihgcs irr.
ohtrā Kurwi bija lohti nelabb
Wihgcs/ ko fawa Nelabbui
deht ne warreja ehst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS faZZ-
us man: Ko redsi tu Jeren
ius? Un es faZZiju: Wihg-
Tahs labbas Wihgcs irr tob
labbas/ un tahs nelabbas Wi-
ges irr lohti nelabbas / ko
Nelabbuna deht ne warre ehst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad notifke ta KUNG-
Wahrd̲s uhs manni/ un faZZija
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta fakta tas KUNGS
tas Ifraeta Deews: Jtt f
schahs Wihgcs labbas/ ta pasit
schu es par labbu tohs Aiswestu
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
